scripts.deps: npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix frontend ci
scripts.dev: npm run infra:up && npx concurrently -k -n "backend,frontend" -c "magenta,cyan" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:nodocker: npx concurrently -k -n "backend,frontend" -c "magenta,cyan" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: npm run infra:up && npx concurrently -k -n "backend,frontend" -c "magenta,cyan" "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
